title: Successful account creation with valid email and password meeting minimum length
description: Verify that a user can successfully create an account by providing a unique email and a password that is at least 8 characters long.

title: Account creation with duplicate email is rejected
description: Verify that account creation fails when the email provided already exists in the system, enforcing the business rule that email must be unique.

title: Account creation with password shorter than 8 characters is rejected
description: Verify that account creation fails when the password is less than 8 characters, enforcing the minimum password length rule.

title: Email uniqueness validation before account creation
description: Verify that the system checks for email uniqueness before proceeding with account creation, ensuring no duplicate accounts are created.

title: Password length validation at exactly 8 characters
description: Verify that account creation succeeds when the password is exactly 8 characters long, testing the lower boundary of the minimum length requirement.

title: Password length validation at 7 characters (just below minimum)
description: Verify that account creation fails when the password is 7 characters long, testing the boundary just below the minimum length requirement.
